metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1754
metadata.comment:
Rationale: DGKθ KD and KO negatively affects SV endocytosis (measured with synaptophysin-pHluorin) in cultured rat neurons (Fig.2) and in mouse neurons (Fig.4). The DGK activity in brain of DGKθ KO mice is reduced (Fig.3) and this activity is essential to rescue the SV recycling phenotype (Fig.4).

Note: DGKθ is a lipid metabolazing enzyme that may change the properties of the plasma membrane.Since not addressed specifically in this paper, I refrain from linking this molecular function of DGKtheta to SV recycling.. Experimental description: From personal communication with the author:
Fig.2: rat neurons
Fig.3/4; mouse species
Over-expressed DGKtheta is of human species.

31/10/2017 Pim
- Based on the mouse KO data I approve annotation to mouse species. Rat protein annotation can also be made based on Fig.2.
